name: Ocean View Aviators
description: Gold-rimmed aviator sunglasses with UV400 polarized lenses. Perfect for beach days and sunny drives.

name: Zinc Shield SPF 50
description: Water-resistant reef-safe mineral sunscreen. Keeps your skin protected for up to 80 minutes in water.

name: Breezy Linen Top
description: 100% organic breathable linen shirt. Stay cool and stylish under the summer sun.

name: Artisan Tote Bag
description: Hand-woven eco-friendly beach tote. Spacious enough for all your summer essentials.

name: Wide Brim Straw Hat
description: Wide-brimmed UPF 50+ straw hat. Lightweight and stylish sun protection for any outdoor adventure.

name: Aloe After-Sun Gel
description: Cooling aloe vera gel for post-sun care. Soothes and hydrates sun-exposed skin instantly.

name: Flip Flops Pro
description: Comfortable anti-slip flip flops with memory foam insole. Perfect for beach and poolside.
